Dashboard Archive: 2026-05-08 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
Today's momentum-ranker-long dashboard shows AGX dominating the rankings with a score of 94.8 and rank #1, driven by extraordinary long-term returns of 1,890% over 10 years and 1,230% over 5 years, which significantly outpace SPY across all timeframes (1,633% vs SPY's 10-year). AGX's momentum ratios are exceptionally strong, particularly the 8.0x jump from 1-month to 3-month returns, and it passes all four SMA trend filters, marking it as a "strong_buy" with a clean momentum signal despite thin trading volume. LINC appears as the second entry with equally impressive 10-year returns of 2,126% but shows more volatile ratio progression, notably a 0.92 ratio from 1-year to 6-month returns suggesting recent deceleration relative to mid-term gains. Both tickers maintain pristine technical positioning across all moving averages and show substantial outperformance relative to SPY and QQQ, though AGX's more consistent ratio progression and higher overall score suggest more stable long-term momentum.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.

Click column headers to sort  |  Score = percentile composite: returns + ratio passes + bad-SPY resilience  |  SMA ✓ = price above all SMAs (30/50/100/200)  |  Ratio = short-term momentum consistency (out of 5 tests)  |  M = momentum signal (sortable) —  ● clean  ● stalling  ● overextended  |  V = volume confirmation (sortable) —  ● confirmed  ● normal  ○ thin  |  PB = entry timing: down day on strong stock (sortable by 1d return) —  ● buy today  ○ none  |  OL = theme overlap vs owned tickers —  ● overlap  ○ clear
